note: Canonical archetype taxonomy (D32). The SINGLE source of truth pulled by BOTH the offline authoring artifact (artifact/case_author.jsx) and the app engine. An ARCHETYPE is a presenting SYNDROME (many per case, e.g. DKA is vomiting + acute_abdomen); a case's sub-specialty/domain lives in the case-file `system` array (e.g. GI, Renal/Urinary). Archetypes are the unit for student selection (random-within-archetype) and the pooled study rubric (D30). This file is NOT a D11 blueprint and generates nothing; it is a tag list. Add an entry here before tagging cases with a new archetype.
